event: Architectural Drawing of Pantheon Column Details
description: A detailed architectural engraving showing the components of a Corinthian column from the Pantheon in Rome. The large central element is an ornate Corinthian capital with acanthus leaf decoration. Below it, the column base with molding profiles is shown. To the right, a smaller full-length column is depicted for scale and proportion. Various measurements and technical annotations appear throughout. The drawing is rendered in fine line engraving with careful attention to classical architectural proportions.

_meta.title: Demonstration in large parts of the Portico of the Pantheon
